statement.en: Minimum overlap problem (Erdős Problem 36): Let A, B be a partition of {1, ..., 2n} with |A| = |B| = n. Let MaxOverlap(A,B) = max_k |{(a,b): a ∈ A, b ∈ B, a−b = k}|, and M(n) = min over partitions of MaxOverlap. Determine lim_{n→∞} M(n)/n. Current: 0.379005 ≤ lim ≤ 0.3809268534330870.
statement.ja: 最小重複問題 (Erdős 問題 36): {1,...,2n} を二つの大きさ n の部分集合 A, B に分割するとき、差 k = a−b の重複 MaxOverlap を最小化する M(n) を定め、M(n)/n の極限を求めよ. 現在 0.379005 ≤ 極限 ≤ 0.3809268534330870.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: 極限 lim M(n)/n 決定問題. 下界 0.379005 と上界 0.3809268534330870 が 70 年で漸近接近 (幅 0.00192 = 0.5%). FLOWING 収束中
reiTyping.rationale: 型=I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE (極限値), 副=III_CONVERGENCE_WITNESS (上下界収束). 形式化=scaffold (実 sorry=21 in ErdosProblems/36.lean, 大半が bounds variants)

external: Scherk 1955 (pers. comm., reported by Moser 1959): 1 − 1/√2 ≈ 0.2929 lower
Haugland 1996 J. Number Theory: 0.38200... upper + lower √(4−√15)

formalization.notes: Namespaces: Erdos36. 実 file 211 行. 豊富な bounds variants 構造: M(n) 定義 + MinOverlapQuotient + 5 lower bounds (Erdős 1955, Scherk 1955, Świerczkowski 1958, Haugland 1996, White 2022) + 4 upper bounds (Erdős 1955 = 1/2, MRS 1956 = 2/5, Haugland 1996 = 0.382..., Haugland 2022 = 0.380926...) + 5 test M(1)..M(5) + main erdos_36 limit + erdos_36.variants.exists + lower/upper improved goals = 21 sorry 合計

reiAssessment.approachSuggestion: M(1)=1, M(2)=1, M(3)=2, M(4)=2, M(5)=3 の 5 件は native_decide / Finset 全列挙で決定可能 → 5 sorry 閉鎖 Tier-1 target. 下界 Erdős 1/4, Scherk 1−1/√2 は基本 real analysis で可. 上界 Erdős 1/2 も tractable. 高度な Haugland 1996/2022, White 2022 は研究論文の Lean 移植大工事
reiAssessment.solveRationale: I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE + III_CONVERGENCE_WITNESS, FLOWING. 21 sorry 多いが M(1)..M(5) + 基本 bounds は段階攻略可能. 極限値確定は 70 年 open
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: 21 sorry は段階的攻略可: 小 n (5) + 基本 bounds (5) = 10 sorry が Tier-1, 残 11 は研究 paper 移植 Tier-3
reiAssessment.famousHardCap: 極限値の exact value は世界的 open since 1955
